response.original_title: Royal Caribbean Add Passenger Dial +1 (833) 624 0944 – The Perfect Day at CocoCay: Does Your New Guest Get Your Chill Island Cabana?
response.overview: Royal Caribbean Add Passenger Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 confirms that CocoCay cabana reservations do NOT automatically transfer to new guests. If you already booked a Chill Island cabana before adding someone, Royal Caribbean Add Passenger Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 agents must manually add your new passenger to the reservation. Cabanas have strict capacity limits – 8 guests max. Call now ☎️ +1 (833) 624 0944 before final payment, 75-90 days pre-sailing. Royal Caribbean Add Passenger Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 warns that repricing your booking may cancel your cabana entirely. New guests pay today's CocoCay pass price, not your original rate. Thrill Waterpark and Hideaway Beach transfers require separate calls. Speak to an expert 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 to verify cabana availability before adding anyone. Royal Caribbean Add Passenger Dial 📞 +1 (833) 624 0944 cannot add after manifest closes, 72 hours before departure
response.title: Royal Caribbean Add Passenger Dial +1 (833) 624 0944 – The Perfect Day at CocoCay: Does Your New Guest Get Your Chill Island Cabana?
